name: Ginger-Soy Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together all ingredients.
2. Use the marinade to marinate meat, fish, or chicken for at least an hour, turning occasionally to coat evenly.
3. The remaining marinade can be used to baste the meat while it is cooking.
4. This recipe yields 3/4 cup and serves 6.
